title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PharmEasy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PharmEasy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PharmEasy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About PharmEasy:
PharmEasy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy!
